{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032400424347C482E3D428F50729F3"}"},"total":201},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7576661103053177662","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，快点更新，精彩部分啊，最喜欢荒天帝没有之一，加一个女帝","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":18,"text":"荒天帝","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%8D%92%E5%A4%A9%E5%B8%9D&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774284163F50729F3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227576661103053177662%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227557282501698276414%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%8D%92%E5%A4%A9%E5%B8%9D%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764115059,"group_id":"7557282501698276414","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"写自己喜欢的故事...","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/qELQ58TrvuO/zsokGIQzfsFFwX1Attcrqj2Zbw4nC+","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6477d009f489437c957e560ee9e361bc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875716&x-signature=G%2BCIv9YP8VR9lypEuAy5E%2Bjm5E8%3D","user_id":"3897139086230087","user_name":"喜欢吃榴莲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3897139086230087","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741059169,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7557282501698276414","book_info":{"abstract":"某一天，诸天万界忽然出现一道天幕，显示【盘点万界至高世界】




一叶遮天世界

有女帝红尘为仙，抬手镇杀古皇大帝，风华绝代！

完美大世界

有帝横渡万界之海，一剑万界生灭，独断万古！

诸君，且观界海尽头终极一战！

圣虚世界

祭海一朵浪花，便是三千大世界。

仙帝映照诸天，祭道之上，无限盒子！

海神：“吓尿了！”

韩老魔：“吉尔发麻！”

炎帝：“原来我从没见过世面！”

诸天万界震惊：“这就是至高世界吗？恐怖如斯！”

永生，圣王，龙符……

最后，当压轴王炸出来。

诸天万界起立！
